notes_for_human_reviewer: Every risk has all 5 fields; named owners + follow-up dates; mitigations specific and actionable; clean RAID categorization. Single snapshot — no prior-week column, no closed/reopened items, no status history. Lives or dies on the 'living artifact' dimension. Overall weighted average 4.2 → hire_ready=true even with one dim floored (rubric formula: any-dim-under-3 → pass=false, but hire_ready based on overall only). living_artifact_evidence tolerance widened to 2 because Claude shows ~1pt drift on this dim at T=0.
